prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约15770→17398→17605→26731→27385，整体呈持续后移趋势，尤其2024年跳升约9126名，2025年继续小幅后移约654名；2025年基准位 次约27385名；本省物理类计划2021年93人、2022年89人、2023年86人、2024年89人、2025年91人，2026年大幅扩招至111人，较2025年增加20人（+22%） ，扩招幅度显著，将缓解部分竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉:
211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年约第84–92位，2026年约第89位，属中上水平211，综合实力稳定。
4. 【声誉热度】近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情；抖音热度评级为「一般」，总排名第83位，短视频曝光量中等；无历史投档断档记录，报考心理预期稳定；交 通运输工程为唯一A-学科（第五轮评估），是学校核心优势，与道路桥梁与渡河工程、交通工程、交通运输等招生专业直接对应，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度高热推荐，长安大学均设有对应专业；土木建筑类社会热度分化观望；本省物理类考生2021年20.6万→2025年32.0万 →2026年约34.7万（+8.4%），竞争持续加剧；省控线（本科批）2025年405分，近年稳中有降；长安大学位于陕西西安，非本省高校，在湖南无特殊地域偏好；该校在湖南招生占比约2–3%，属正常跨省招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招（+22%）的缓解效应、本省物理类考生增加（+8.4%）的竞争 加剧，以及学校声誉平稳、优势学科明确的综合判断，预计2026年最低位次在2025年基准27385名基础上因扩招而明显后移，但考生增加和位次下行趋势部分抵消扩招效应；预测 最低位次约31196名，区间30696–31696名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 15770 → 17398 → 17605 → 26731 → 27385, showing a continuous backward trend, especially in 2024 with a jump of about 9126 places, and in 2025 with a slight backward shift of about 654 places; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 27385. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 93 in 2021, 89 in 2022, 86 in 2023, 89 in 2024, and 91 in 2025, with a significant expansion to 111 in 2026, an increase of 20 students (+22%) compared to 2025, which will alleviate some competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science main ranking in recent years is about 84th–92nd, and about 89th in 2026, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities with stable comprehensive strength.
4. [Reputation and Popularity] In recent years, the reputation has been stable with no obvious negative public opinion; the Douyin popularity rating is 'average', with an overall ranking of 83rd and moderate short video exposure; no historical enrollment gaps, stable psychological expectations for applicants; Transportation Engineering is the only A- discipline (fifth round evaluation), which is the core advantage of the university, directly corresponding to enrollment majors such as Road, Bridge and River-Crossing Engineering, Traffic Engineering, and Transportation, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended due to social popularity; Civil Engineering and Architecture majors have divided social popularity; the number of provincial Physics Category candidates increased from 206,000 in 2021 to 320,000 in 2025, and is expected to be about 347,000 in 2026 (+8.4%), with intensifying competition; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) was 405 points in 2025, with a stable or slightly decreasing trend in recent years; Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, not a provincial university, with no special regional preference in Hunan; the university's enrollment proportion in Hunan is about 2–3%, which is a normal cross-provincial enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the mitigating effect of the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+22%), the intensified competition due to the increase in provincial Physics Category candidates (+8.4%), and the stable reputation and clear advantageous disciplines of the university, it is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will significantly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 27385 due to enrollment expansion, but the increase in candidates and the downward trend in rankings will partially offset the expansion effect; the predicted minimum ranking is about 31196, with a range of 30696–31696.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 30696–31696, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors (Engineering Experimental Class Huawei Class/Computer Science) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 30696), focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship Transportation majors; for rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 31696), prioritize Tier 3 safety majors and be cautious with Tier 1 popular majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 3452 → 3928 → 4238 → 4588 → 4933, showing a continuous slight downward trend with an average annual decline of about 370 places; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4933; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 7 in 2021, 7 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 8 in 2024, and 13 in 2025, with a reduction to 10 in 2026, a decrease of 3 (-23%) compared to 2025, indicating a significant reduction in enrollment and increased competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking has been around 84–92 in recent years, approximately 89th in 2026, placing it at an upper-middle level among 211 universities with stable overall strength; its reputation has been stable in recent years with no obvious negative public opinion; its Douyin popularity rating is 'average', ranking 83rd overall; no historical record of admission cut-off gaps, indicating stable expectations among applicants; Chang'an University is primarily engineering-oriented, and its History Category majors (Journalism and Communication, Business Administration, Law, English, Public Administration, Architecture, Logistics Management) have low relevance to its A- discipline of Transportation Engineering, limiting the appeal of its advantageous disciplines to History Category students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language/Literature and other liberal arts majors have high social popularity; Journalism and Communication majors are clearly discouraged by social trends; the number of provincial History Category examinees was 166,000 in 2021 → 143,000 in 2025 → approximately 187,000 in 2026 (+31.2%), a significant rebound leading to sharply increased competition; the provincial control line (undergraduate batch) was 446 points in 2025, with little fluctuation in recent years; Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, not a local university in Hunan, with no special regional preference in Hunan; its History Category enrollment in Hunan is small (about 10 students), which is a normal cross-provincial enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous downward trend in historical rankings, the intensified competition effect from the 2026 enrollment reduction (-23%), the significant competitive pressure from the sharp increase in provincial History Category examinees (+31.2%), and the objective fact that the university's advantageous disciplines have low relevance to liberal arts majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking for 2026 will move upward (harder to enter) from the 2025 baseline of 4933 due to enrollment reduction and a large increase in examinees; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4400, with a range of 3900–4900.

- Law.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Logistics Management.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3900–4900, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors (Law) as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 3900), prioritize competitive majors like Law; if the ranking is near the upper limit (around 4900), mainly rely on Tier 3 safety majors. Note that Chang'an University has few History Category majors and they have low relevance to the university's engineering strengths, so applicants should consider personal interests and career prospects comprehensively.
